description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a prominent gable roof and a mix of brick and siding exterior finishes. The front features a large window and a covered porch area, while the side and rear yards include landscaped greenery and a swimming pool. The property is bordered by a wooden fence and includes a driveway leading to an attached garage. The backyard is spacious, with a patio area adjacent to the pool and several trees providing shade. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with larger panes facing the front and side, and smaller windows distributed along the other walls. The overall design is contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern bungalow with a gable roof, brick and siding exterior, attached garage, landscaped yard, and a backyard pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large front window, covered porch, driveway, and attached garage.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage, side yard, and partial view of the backyard pool and patio.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, swimming pool, patio area, and garden with trees and shrubs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the chimney, side garden, and a clear look at the backyard landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
